title: FirstJoinCommand
description: A simple and lightweight plugin that executes commands the first time a player joins your server
body:
# 🎉 FirstJoinCommand

A simple and lightweight plugin that executes custom commands **the first time a player joins** your server.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🧾 Run any set of console commands on a player’s first join.  
- ⚙️ Fully configurable through `config.yml`.  
- 📌 Supports placeholders like `%player%` for dynamic command execution.  
- 🔁 No performance impact — only runs once per player.  
- 🧩 Easy to install and use — single-class plugin friendly!

---

## 🛠️ Commands

| Command                    | Description                        | Permission                |
|----------------------------|------------------------------------|----------------------------|
| `/firstjoincommand reload` | Reloads the configuration file     | `firstjoincommand.reload` |

---
